dod_fulfillment.details: Critical DoD violation: AUTH-2 acceptance criteria not met

dmails.description: AUTH-2 DoD acceptance criteria violation forces high severity
dmails.detail: The login flow fails to implement 2FA as required by DoD for AUTH-2. DoD score 75 exceeds force-high threshold of 70.

reasoning: DoD fulfillment score 75 exceeds force-high threshold of 70, escalating severity regardless of total divergence value.
